title: armeria neglecta
intro: Armeria neglecta, also known as Marsh Thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice among herbalists. Armeria neglecta can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected area.
